title.en: They didn't think too much about it and continu...

content.en:
When Ye Tian entered the territory of the ghost dragon insects again, this group of ghost dragon insects was stunned.

They are also wise, they obviously paid a heavy price to kill Ye Tian, the intruder, why did Ye Tian appear again?

They didn't think too much about it and continued to besiege Ye Tian.

This time, however, they were no match.

It's not just that the number is much less, but also because of the injury, and many of the ghost dragon insects that survived are still injured.

As a result, Ye Tian completely crushed them.

As time passed, the number of ghost dragon bugs became less and less.

And these ghost dragon insects are getting more and more crazy, even the Heavenly Ancestor-level ghost dragon insects choose to self-destruct, but they are still useless, and they can't kill Ye Tian in their heyday at all.

In the end, Ye Tian killed all these ghost dragon insects at the cost of serious injuries.

"The Ghost Dragon Worm race is really crazy, if you don't attack me, I won't kill you all!" Ye Tian said helplessly.

This time, he was completely forced to fight back!

He then began to explore the area.

The area here is not very large, only this green sea.

Ye Tian entered the green ocean, and a large amount of energy poured into his body, helping him to improve the flesh and blood of the Heavenly Ancestor, and the effect was quite good.

Those ghost dragon insects did not have a complete cultivation system, they only relied on instinct to absorb energy, and they were able to give birth to Heavenly Ancestor-level clansmen.

And Ye Tian took the initiative to absorb energy to cultivate, and the effect was naturally better.

Later, he found some green stones at the bottom of the green ocean, which contained more powerful energy and had a better effect on refining his body.

"This will be my cultivation place from now on!"

He was going to hide the hole so that even if other Heavenly Ancestors passed by here, they wouldn't be able to find it.

So, he started doing it.

It didn't take long for the entrance of the cave to disappear, and a very hidden magic circle completely covered the place, as long as you didn't come here at close range, you couldn't sense the fluctuations of the magic circle.

Of course.

The 10,000-eyed snake knew that there existed here, but if the other party dared to come here, he would directly wipe it out.

However, some time passed, and the 10,000-eyed snake still did not come here.

"That 10,000-eyed snake is very smart, and when it knows that I occupy this treasure land, it completely gives up!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Time flies.

Ye Tian spent the rest of his years cultivating here, and his flesh and blood body became stronger and stronger.

And on this day, he used the true dragon blood marrow fluid to once again integrate an immeasurable supernatural technique into his whole body, and this immeasurable supernatural technique was the ten-armed golden body.

After integrating into the ten-armed golden body, his strength has not increased much, but his body's defense has greatly improved, even if he stands still and lets an ordinary Heavenly Ancestor attack, he doesn't even need to deliberately defend, the other party can't break his defense.

Another period of time passed.

Ye Tian finally integrated the immeasurable magic technique of the Heaven Slaying Blade into his whole body, his attack power increased a little, his body became stronger again, and his strength also skyrocketed.

In the years that followed, he integrated an ordinary top-notch immeasurable magic technique into his whole body, but the increase in strength was very small, but he was also improving his strength.

In addition, cultivating in this green ocean, his physical fitness is improving all the time, and his overall strength is naturally improving rapidly.

However, he was still in the first stage of the Heavenly Ancestor - Fusion!

The body fusion stage is to integrate the immeasurable supernatural power of the whole body into the whole body, and constantly improve the strength of the body's flesh and blood, and almost all the Heavenly Ancestors of the Ten Thousand Dragons Territorial Sea are in this stage.

Heavenly Ancestors like Dongao Heavenly Ancestor have surpassed the first stage and reached the second stage - Blood Transformation!

The so-called blood transformation stage is that after all the immeasurable supernatural powers are integrated into the whole body, the body will produce a kind of immeasurable supernatural light, representing the state of consummation of the body.

After reaching this realm, it is necessary to use the immeasurable supernatural light to integrate into the heart, promote the transformation of the heart, and use the heart transformation to make the immeasurable blood change.

But the heart is almost impossible to transform, and the immeasurable supernatural light is just a shadow.

For example, many Heavenly Ancestors in the Wanlong Territorial Sea have cultivated for endless years, and they have not achieved this step, unless they have obtained a great opportunity.

For example, Dongao Heavenly Ancestor also found such an opportunity in the True Dragon Realm Ruins, which allowed the heart to transform, so that the immeasurable blood of the whole body could complete some blood changes, complete the breakthrough, and reach the blood transformation realm of the Heavenly Ancestor.

And the blood transformation realm is also divided into nine blood transformations, and each completion of the blood transformation is enough to transform the strength.

"Although I haven't reached the Blood Transformation Realm yet, my current strength is definitely no less than that of Dongao Heavenly Ancestor, and I may even be above him!" Ye Tian was very confident in his heart.

......

The years passed.

Hundreds of millions of years have passed.

For the Heavenly Ancestors, this was only a very short period of time, but Ye Tian had changed a lot.

He had already integrated a lot of immeasurable magic techniques into his body, but the true dragon blood marrow fluid on his body had also been exhausted.

Of course, he could slowly integrate all kinds of immeasurable magical powers into his whole body later, and he didn't need to use the real dragon blood marrow fluid.

But in that case, it will take too long.

"I have to find the True Dragon Blood Golden Stone, with my current strength, I don't have to worry about the creatures in the ruins of the True Dragon Realm, even if it's a true dragon clan, I don't have to worry about it!"

Ye Tian's other replica body began to search for the True Dragon Blood Golden Stone all over the True Dragon Realm Ruins.

this day.

He found a vein of true dragon blood goldstone, which was located inside the lair of a Heavenly Ancestor-level creature.

"Outsider, get out of here!"

A Heavenly Ancestor-level creature resembling a tiger and leopard appeared, its huge body permeated with an extremely terrifying aura, much more powerful than ordinary Heavenly Ancestors.

But for Ye Tian, this Heavenly Ancestor-level creature was too weak.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian slapped it away, and the immeasurable bones of his whole body were shattered, directly injuring him seriously.

It's still merciful on his subordinates, otherwise one move can kill it in seconds.

Swish!

This Heavenly Ancestor creature was so frightened that he fled and didn't want his lair.

Thundered!!!!!

The earth is torn apart.

One by one, the True Dragon Blood Golden Stone was taken out by Ye Tian.

"There are only thousands of True Dragon Blood Golden Stones, which is a bit small!"

But it's also a harvest, and Ye Tian didn't dislike it.

Swish!

He left here to find the other True Dragon's Blood Stones.

And after a long time, the Heavenly Ancestor-level creature came back here, but when he saw that his lair was torn apart, he found a new one.
